S.FORM: Abdrabbuh Mansur Hadi Mntucing hngkawas 1945 idas 9 jiyax 1 ka Abdrabbuh Mansur Hadi ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Yemen ta sayang o kiya ka Abdrabbuh Mansur Hadi, pnaah hngkawas 2012 idas 2 jiyax 27 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: abdɾabbuħ mansuɾ ħadi mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka abdɾabbuħ mansuɾ ħadi ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan jəmən ta sajaŋ o kija ka abdɾabbuħ mansuɾ ħadi, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: Abdrabbuh Mansur Hadi Mntucing hngkawas 1945 idas 9 jiyax 1 ka Abdrabbuh Mansur Hadi ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Yemen ta sayang o kiya ka Abdrabbuh Mansur Hadi, pnaah hngkawas 2012 idas 2 jiyax 27 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: abdɾabbuħ mansuɾ ħadi mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka abdɾabbuħ mansuɾ ħadi ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan jəmən ta sajaŋ o kija ka abdɾabbuħ mansuɾ ħadi, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
